description_long: This is a modern, rectangular couch with a deep burgundy fabric covering both the seat and the backrest. The seat and backrest are both broad, flat, and appear to be lightly cushioned, with the upholstery showing a subtle, uniform texture. The armrests are straight, medium-height, and fully upholstered in a darker brown material that matches the base of the couch. The couch sits on four short, round, metallic legs that slightly elevate it off the ground, providing a contemporary touch. The back of the couch is fully covered in the same burgundy fabric as the seat and backrest, with no visible seams or tufting. There are no visible accent pillows or decorative elements, giving the couch a minimalist and functional appearance.
description: A modern, burgundy-upholstered couch with straight brown armrests and metallic legs, featuring a minimalist, rectangular design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide burgundy seat and backrest, straight brown armrests, and two visible metallic legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the solid brown armrest, and the slim profile of the backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous burgundy backrest and brown base, with no visible seams or decorative features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the brown armrest and the length of the seat.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: One continuous seat cushion and one continuous back cushion, both integrated and attached, with no visible accent or throw pillows.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid burgundy fabric with a subtle, uniform texture and no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
attribute_leg_style: Short, round, exposed metallic legs with a simple, modern design; legs are evenly spaced and slightly elevate the couch.
attribute_armrest_design: Straight, medium-height armrests fully upholstered in brown material, matching the base, with a boxy, rectangular profile.
attribute_backrest_type: High, continuous, and attached backrest, fully upholstered in burgundy fabric, with a flat, unembellished surface.
